name_en: GG Dionysus 2020ss New Dionysus The new Dionysus tiger head logo is diamond-encrusted, and the whole design has been simplified from complex to simple, retaining the classic medium size elegant and dainty bag shape, but the weight has become much lighter! No longer the complaint of being "as heavy as a stone". Ah~ this new Dionysus is really so perfect for me! Size: 25×13.5×7cm #499623m.
